# 
> A CLI and MCP server that indexes a codebase once, exposes exports at four resolution levels (L0-L3), and measures AI skills impact through A/B benchmarks.

## Entry Points
- [cli.ts](packages/cli/src/cli.ts): async

## .
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): sensei
- [PATTERNS.md](PATTERNS.md): Patterns
- [README.md](README.md): sensei

- [load-context.ts](packages/server/src/tools/load-context.ts): LoadContextResult, loadContext

## packages/shared/src
- [config.spec.ts](packages/shared/src/config.spec.ts): async
- [config.ts](packages/shared/src/config.ts): SenseiRepoConfig, SenseiCredentials, loadSenseiConfig, loadCredentials
- [constants.ts](packages/shared/src/constants.ts): SENSEI_DIR, senseiPath
- [domain.ts](packages/shared/src/domain.ts): Repo, EntryPoint, SymbolKind, RepoSymbol, CallEdge
- [supabase-client.ts](packages/shared/src/supabase-client.ts): makeSenseiClient
- [token-counter.ts](packages/shared/src/token-counter.ts): TokenCounter, EstimateTokenCounter, OpenAITokenCounter, AnthropicTokenCounter, createTokenCounter
- [types.ts](packages/shared/src/types.ts): LlmSpec, ResolutionLevel, SymbolEntry, SymbolMap, LlmsTxtSection

## packages/tools/src
- [index-reader.ts](packages/tools/src/index-reader.ts): readLlmSpec, readSymbolMap, readIndexFile

## packages/tools/src/benchmark/indexer-comparison
- [cocoindex-adapter.ts](packages/tools/src/benchmark/indexer-comparison/cocoindex-adapter.ts): CocoIndex, connectCocoindex
- [ground-truth.ts](packages/tools/src/benchmark/indexer-comparison/ground-truth.ts): GroundTruth, extractGroundTruth
- [reporter.ts](packages/tools/src/benchmark/indexer-comparison/reporter.ts): printReport, writeMarkdownReport
- [scorer.ts](packages/tools/src/benchmark/indexer-comparison/scorer.ts): score
- [sensei-adapter.ts](packages/tools/src/benchmark/indexer-comparison/sensei-adapter.ts): SenseiIndex, loadSenseiIndex
- [types.ts](packages/tools/src/benchmark/indexer-comparison/types.ts): IndexedFile, CocoChunk, SenseiSymbol, TestQuery, ComparisonReport

## packages/tools/src/tools
- [bm25.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/bm25.ts): scoreBM25
- [chunker.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/chunker.ts): extractChunks, buildChunksAndEmbeddings
- [context.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/context.ts): ContextSlice, loadContext, recommendNext
- [coverage.spec.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/coverage.spec.ts): function
- [coverage.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/coverage.ts): CoverageEntry, generateCoverage
- [drift.spec.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/drift.spec.ts): function
- [drift.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/drift.ts): DriftEntry, DriftResult, checkDrift
- [embedder.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/embedder.ts): embed, isAvailable, ensureReady
- [entry-point-adapters.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/entry-point-adapters.ts): EntryPointCandidate, inferEntryPoints
- [llms-txt.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/llms-txt.ts): buildSections, renderSection, parseLlmsTxt, GenerateLlmsTxtResult, generateLlmsTxt
- [project-memory.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/project-memory.ts): getSessionContext, addDecision, addPattern, askQuestion, getOpenItems
- [query.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/query.ts): getLlmSpec, getFileContext, listExports, findPattern, getShortcuts
- [reindex.spec.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/reindex.spec.ts): function
- [reindex.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/reindex.ts): IndexSummary, reindexRepo, extractExports, extractMarkdownSymbols, extractHeuristic
- [repo-registration.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/repo-registration.ts): RepoInfo, registerRepo
- [search.spec.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/search.spec.ts): function
- [search.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/search.ts): SearchResult, search
- [supabase-index-writer.ts](packages/tools/src/tools/supabase-index-writer.ts): TraceabilityEntry, upsertSymbols, upsertDocs
